channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Panera Bread: BOGO for $5 — Buy Any Whole Sandwich, Salad or Bowl, Get a Second for $5
item.guid: Panera Bread-BOGO for $5 — Buy Any Whole Sandwich, Sa-2026-07-17
item.description: Use code BOGO5 at checkout on Panera's site or app to get a second whole sandwich, salad, or bowl for just $5 (discount applies to lower-priced item). (Limited time)

item.title: Jamba: Hat Trick Tango — World Cup Limited-Time Smoothie + 50% Off
item.guid: Jamba-Hat Trick Tango — World Cup Limited-Time-2026-07-17
item.description: Jamba launched the limited-time Hat Trick Tango smoothie for FIFA World Cup 2026 with a 50% off in-app deal. (Limited time)

item.title: Domino's: Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings for $9.99
item.guid: Domino's-Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings for $-2026-07-17
item.description: Order any Domino's pizza with any crust (including Parmesan Stuffed Crust) and up to 7 toppings for just $9.99 online or in the app. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: McDonald's: $5 Meal Deal via App
item.description: Order in the McDonald's app to get a McDouble or McChicken with 4-piece McNuggets, small fries, and a small drink for $5. (Ongoing)

item.title: Wendy's: $6 Biggie Bag
item.description: Pick a Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger, Crispy Chicken BLT, Double Stack, or Jr. Cheeseburger plus 4 nuggets, junior fries, and a small drink for $6. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box
item.description: App-exclusive box stacked with a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips & nacho cheese, and a medium drink. (Ongoing)

item.title: Burger King: $5 Your Way Meal
item.description: Choose a Double Cheeseburger, Bacon Double Cheeseburger, or Crispy Chicken Jr. with 4-piece nuggets, small fries, and a small drink for $5 via app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Arby's: $7.99 Meat & 3 Box
item.description: Get a Roast Beef or Crispy Chicken Sandwich plus three sides and a small drink for $7.99 at participating locations. (Limited time)

item.title: Dunkin': $6 Meal Deal — Coffee + 2 Wake Up Wraps
item.guid: Dunkin'-$6 Meal Deal — Coffee + 2 Wake Up Wraps-2026-07-17
item.description: Score a medium hot or iced coffee plus two Bacon, Egg & Cheese Wake Up Wraps for just $6 in the Dunkin' app. (Limited time)

item.title: Subway: $6.99 Meal of the Day
item.description: Get the $6.99 Meal of the Day in the Subway app, which includes a footlong sub, chips or 2 cookies, and a small drink. (Ongoing)

item.title: Jack in the Box: $5 Munch Better Meal + 2 Tacos for $0.99 (App)
item.guid: Jack in the Box-$5 Munch Better Meal + 2 Tacos for $0.99-2026-07-17
item.description: Night-owl staple: grab the $5 Munch Better Meal (sandwich + fries + drink) and add 2 crispy tacos for just $0.99 — both available in the app 24/7. (Ongoing)

item.title: Del Taco: Del's Real Deals — Value Items from $1
item.guid: Del Taco-Del's Real Deals — Value Items from -2026-07-17
item.description: Del Taco's Del's Real Deals value menu offers tacos, bean & cheese burritos, rollers, and more starting at just $1 — available all day, drive-thru open late. (Ongoing)

item.title: Whataburger: Whatadeals Value Menu — Starting at $3
item.description: Whataburger's Whatadeals menu offers value items from $3 (Big Ranch Wrap) to $5 (Whataburger Jr.) with a $2.50 meal upgrade — available at 24-hour locations. (Ongoing)

item.title: IHOP: $6 Value Menu Deals
item.description: IHOP's $6 Value Menu is available all day at participating locations, making it a solid late-night option for budget-friendly breakfast or dinner. (Ongoing)

item.title: Denny's: Slammin' Meal Deals — Starting Under $10
item.description: Denny's Slammin' Meal Deals offer hearty all-day breakfast, lunch, and dinner combos starting under $10 at participating 24-hour locations nationwide. (Ongoing)

item.title: Shake Shack: Any Custard for $3 with Code CUSTARDTIME
item.guid: Shake Shack-Any Custard for $3 with Code CUSTARDTIME-2026-07-17
item.description: Use code CUSTARDTIME in the Shake Shack app, online, or at a kiosk to get any custard for just $3 — a standout summer frozen treat deal. (Through August 19, 2026)

item.title: Wingstop: $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal for Soccer Season
item.guid: Wingstop-$16.99 Boneless Meal Deal for Soccer Sea-2026-07-17
item.description: Wingstop has revived its $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal for the FIFA World Cup soccer season — a fan-favorite bundle at a solid discount. (Limited time)
